metadata.name: Draft an Abstract for a Scientific Publication

description: A medical writer needs to draft an abstract summarizing the results of a clinical study for submission to a journal.

nodes.task_description: Review the clinical study report (CSR) to understand the key findings.

expected_outcome.value: Agent identifies the primary and key secondary endpoint results from the CSR.

nodes.task_description: Draft the abstract following the standard IMRAD (Introduction, Methods, Results, and Discussion) structure.

expected_outcome.value: Agent writes a draft abstract that correctly follows the IMRAD format.

nodes.task_description: Ensure the abstract adheres to the word count limit of the target journal (e.g., 250 words).

expected_outcome.value: Agent edits the abstract to meet the length requirement without losing key information.

nodes.task_description: Route the draft abstract for internal review and approval before submission.

expected_outcome.value: Agent sends the draft to the study authors for their review and approval.
